title: Monitoring surgical wounds for infection: leaflets for patients
body: "Surgical site infection leaflets             Monitoring surgical wounds for infection: information for patients    PDF, 684 KB, 4 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email publications@ukhsa.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.                 Monitoring surgical wounds for infection: information for patients – large print version    PDF, 552 KB, 6 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email publications@ukhsa.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      This leaflet is available for healthcare professionals to download and print for patients who are included in post-discharge surveillance submitted to the UK Health Security Agency.  Details of how patients’ data is collected and used is published via the Surgical site infection surveillance privacy notice.  Translated leaflets  The leaflet is also available in:    Arabic surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.15 MB, 4 pages)  Bengali surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.22 MB, 4 pages)  Bulgarian surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.1 MB, 4 pages)  Cantonese surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.4 MB, 4 pages)  Dari surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.17 MB, 4 pages)  Farsi surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.13 MB, 4 pages)  French surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.1 MB, 4 pages)  Gujarati surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.1 MB, 4 pages)  Hindi surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.13 MB, 4 pages)  Hungarian surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.08 MB, 4 pages)  Kurdish Sorani surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.14 MB, 4 pages)  Lithuanian surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.08 MB, 4 pages)  Mandarin surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.22 MB, 4 pages)  Nepali surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.16 MB, 4 pages)  Pashto surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.13 MB, 4 pages)  Polish surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.09 MB, 4 pages)  Portuguese surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.09 MB, 4 pages)  Punjabi surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.11 MB, 4 pages)  Romanian surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.09 MB, 4 pages)  Russian surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.11 MB, 4 pages)  Somali surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.09 MB, 4 pages)  Spanish surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.1 MB, 4 pages)  Tigrinya surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.11 MB, 4 pages)  Turkish surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.09 MB, 4 pages)  Ukranian surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.11 MB, 4 pages)  Welsh surgical site infection leaflet   (PDF, 1.08 MB, 4 pages)   "
